task_objective: Setup automated version releases with GitHub
design_decisions: Transitioned from manual 'release published' trigger to automated 'tag pushed' (v*) trigger for PyPI publishing.
Created release.yml to automatically create GitHub Releases with generated release notes upon pushing a version tag.
Added logic to detect pre-releases (rc, beta, alpha) based on tag naming.
results: Automated release process implemented. Pushing a tag like 'v0.1.3' will now automatically create a GitHub Release with notes and publish to PyPI.
